items.name: Bloody Yukata
items.description: A white kimono with dark crimson stains on the sleeve. The fabric is torn near the hem.

items.name: Rusted Katana
items.description: An old samurai sword covered in rust. The handle wrapping has come loose.

items.name: Torn Paper Fan
items.description: A decorative fan with cherry blossom patterns. Several ribs are broken.

items.name: Straw Sugegasa
items.description: A traveler's woven straw hat. The brim is frayed and stained with rain.

items.name: Folded Crane
items.description: A delicate paper crane with a faded ink mark on one wing.

items.name: Paper Lantern
items.description: A chochin lantern, its washi paper torn and the candle long since burned out.

items.name: Sake Flask
items.description: A ceramic tokkuri half-full of cold sake. A faint lipstick mark stains the rim.

items.name: Daruma Doll
items.description: A round red daruma with only one eye painted in. A wish left unfulfilled.

items.name: Toppled Bonsai
items.description: A miniature pine in a cracked ceramic pot. Soil is spilled across the floor.

items.name: Kitsune Mask
items.description: A fox mask with cracks running through the left eye. Dried flowers are tucked into the straps.
